query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_mandates FROM gc_mandates;
SELECT mandateId, userId, status, createdAt FROM gc_mandates ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_mandates FROM gc_mandates;
SELECT mandateId, userId, status, createdAt FROM gc_mandates ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
